message:
test(fwc): add comprehensive truthfulness verification invariant suite (bead 29.8.4)

+150 readiness tests covering:
- Provenance labeling invariants (authoritative source verification)
- MetadataField unknown vs unsupported rendering (status tag stability)
- Explicit offline wording verification
- Authority error mapping (recoverable vs permanent states)
- CommandTruthMode classification invariants (live/offline/hybrid/passthrough)
- Envelope redaction safety (no credential leaks in transcripts)
- Golden snapshot pinning (compact labels, CLI symbols, exit codes, severity ranks)
- Cross-cutting provenance × availability × mode interactions
Total readiness tests: 502

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
